text:
Once upon a time in a whimsical kingdom of Fluffia, there lived a wise old owl named Olive Owl. Owls usually didn't venture into the heartland where bees buzzed wildly, but Olive had a secret talent.

Each evening, she would visit the mysterious Oak Forest Orchard where ancient trees whispered tales of long-lost magic. One enchanted apple lingered there under the branch of an ancient tree—a magical apple supposed to grant a single wish.

Olive decided she wished for the wisdom to understand the bees' love stories. She would listen from the branches each evening, listening to their hush-hush humming about the queen bee's golden eyes.

One day, curious about their queen's life, Olive snuck closer to the orchard. As she listened, she heard about her journey of collecting petals on her glittering crown of lavender stars.

With a soft hum, she wished upon the magical apple to become a bee.
